findings.message: Variable '$MYSQL_PASSWORD' is not available in the current build stage. ARG variables are scoped to their build stage.

Using curl without --proto "=https" flag is security-sensitive. The HTTP client may follow redirects to clear-text HTTP protocol, which is insecure and can be sniffed, modified or corrupted by attackers.

Credentials should not be hard-coded. Hard-coded credentials in Dockerfiles pose a security risk as they can be exposed in source code repositories and container images. Use Docker secrets, environment variables passed at runtime, or secure secret management systems instead.
